resources.string:
Cloud-Based Secure Electronic Health Record (EHR) System is a secure and intelligent healthcare management application designed to store and manage medical data safely in the cloud. The app provides role-based access for Patients, Doctors, and Lab Technicians to ensure controlled and authorized data usage.

It integrates Firebase Authentication, UID hash-based identification, biometric verification, and screenshot and screen-record restriction to maintain high-level data security and privacy.

The system also includes AI-powered medical report analysis using Machine Learning and TensorFlow Lite, along with an AI chatbot for healthcare assistance.
